allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/pokemon.json'\); const names = d.map\(p => p.name\).filter\(n => /[^A-Z0-9_]/.test\(n\)\); console.log\([...new Set\(names\)].slice\(0,40\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/experiments.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d.filter\(p => p.name === 'Notas'\), null, 2\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./src/data/experiments.json'\); console.log\(d.filter\(p => p.name === 'Notas'\).length, 'Notas entries; total:', d.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/data/pokemon.json'\); const withTypes=p.filter\(x=>x.types\); const withOfficial=p.filter\(x=>x.officialStats\); const withoutOfficial=p.filter\(x=>!x.officialStats&&x.dexNumber\); console.log\('total:',p.length,'have types:',withTypes.length,'have officialStats:',withOfficial.length,'dexNum but no officialStats:',withoutOfficial.length\)")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./src/data/pokemon.json'\); const withTypes=p.filter\(x=>x.types\); const missing=p.filter\(x=>!x.types\); console.log\('have types:',withTypes.length,'missing:',missing.length\); console.log\('sample Bulbasaur:',JSON.stringify\(p.find\(x=>x.dexNumber===1\)?.types\)\); console.log\('sample Mega Gengar:',JSON.stringify\(p.find\(x=>x.name==='MEGA GENGAR'\)?.types\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./src/data/pokemon.json'\); const g = p.find\(x => x.name === 'GYARADOS'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(g, null, 2\)\)")

PowerShell($headers = @{"Accept"="application/vnd.github+json"; "X-GitHub-Api-Version"="2022-11-28"}; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/WiseLibs/better-sqlite3/releases/tags/v11.10.0" -Headers $headers; $resp.assets | Where-Object { $_.name -match "win32" -or $_.name -match "v137" } | Select-Object name, browser_download_url)
